findings.issue: Interactive plot data pipeline breaks on invalid JSON containing NaN; affected datasets silently fail and UI stays in loading state.
findings.evidence: ReportPlotPanel fetches with res.json() and on any error sets payload=null (site/src/components/ReportPlotPanel.tsx:44-52), then renders only 'Loading plot data…' when payload is null (line 161). Strict parse check: 5 invalid series files under site/public/data/v1/reports/**/series/*cond_by_t.json (Unexpected token 'N').
findings.fix: Sanitize export to strict JSON (replace NaN with null or finite numbers), add schema/CI check using strict JSON.parse, and show explicit error state with retry instead of perpetual loading.

findings.issue: Theory map makes an 'all reports' claim that contradicts its own mapping payload.
findings.evidence: theory_map card fpt-pmf says 'used by all reports' (site/public/data/v1/theory_map.json:9) but lists only 6 report_ids with report_count=6 (lines 11-19), while index has 14 reports (site/public/data/v1/index.json:4-143).
findings.fix: Either widen report_ids to all applicable reports or change wording to subset scope; enforce semantic consistency checks in data generation.

findings.issue: Unified theory coverage is incomplete: 4 reports are not mapped by any concept card.
findings.evidence: render-pages labels theory section as 'Unified Mathematical Map' (site/src/lib/render-pages.tsx:248). Cross-check index report_ids vs union(theory_map.cards[*].report_ids) leaves unmapped: grid2d_blackboard_bimodality, grid2d_rect_bimodality, ring_valley, ring_valley_dst.
findings.fix: Add an 'unmapped_reports' consistency check and fail build when non-empty; include at least one concept linkage per report or clearly label reports as intentionally unmapped.

findings.evidence: theory_map consistency check reports duplicate_key_findings PASS with empty details (site/public/data/v1/theory_map.json:114-117), but identical line 'See report assets for detailed findings.' appears in 5 report meta files (e.g., ring_lazy_jump/meta.json:7, ring_lazy_jump_ext/meta.json:7, ring_lazy_flux/meta.json:7, ring_deriv_k2/meta.json:7, ring_valley/meta.json:7).
findings.fix: Change duplicate detection to sentence-level normalized matching across all reports (not only full-list equality) and flag high-frequency boilerplate.

findings.issue: Bilingual UX claim is overstated and plot controls are English-only.
findings.evidence: Homepage claims 'full online, bilingual interface for 14 reports' (site/src/lib/render-pages.tsx:39-40). index shows some reports are en-only (ring_deriv_k2 at site/public/data/v1/index.json:56-60; ring_valley:125-129). ReportPlotPanel labels are hardcoded English ('Interactive Dataset', 'Y scale', 'Smoothing', etc., site/src/components/ReportPlotPanel.tsx:94-130).
findings.fix: Localize ReportPlotPanel via lang prop + localizedText; revise homepage claim to actual coverage (e.g., 'primarily bilingual' or count-based wording).

findings.issue: Path-prefix utility logic is duplicated, increasing divergence risk.
findings.evidence: withBasePath is reimplemented in ReportPlotPanel (site/src/components/ReportPlotPanel.tsx:8-17) while equivalent logic exists in site/src/lib/content.ts (BASE_PATH + withBasePath).
findings.fix: Centralize in one shared utility and import it in both server/client-safe contexts (or split pure util module).

findings.issue: Hard truncation hides mathematical context without disclosure or pagination.
findings.evidence: render-pages slices content silently: math_blocks.slice(0,10) (line 161), assets.slice(0,20) (214), figures.slice(0,24) (228), theory report_ids.slice(0,8) (271).
findings.fix: Show total counts, add 'show more' controls, and preserve discoverability for long math/report content.

quick_wins: Replace NaN tokens with null in generated series JSON and rerun strict JSON validation in CI.
Add explicit plot error state: 'Failed to load dataset' + retry button when fetch/parse fails.
Introduce coverage gate: every report_id in index.json must appear in at least one theory_map card.
Refactor ReportPlotPanel text to localized strings and pass lang from renderReportPage.
Consolidate withBasePath into one shared util and remove duplicate implementation.
Update duplicate_key_findings check to normalized sentence-level dedupe.

crosscheck.focus: claim consistency, truncation behavior, theory/report rendering
report inventory, language coverage baseline (14 reports)
concept coverage, consistency_checks credibility, semantic claim alignment
